name: How to prove my wrist injury happened at work in West Valley City without paperwork?
description: Medical notes, witness statements, job records prove it.[2][5]

mainEntity.name: How to prove my wrist injury happened at work in West Valley City without paperwork?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical notes, witness statements, job records prove it.[2][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Use medical records noting work cause, coworker statements, job logs, photos.[2][5] Your consistent account matters.[2] Key factors: doctor links to duties; timely report; avoid gaps in treatment.[2] Collect any evidence now, see specialist, lawyer subpoenas employer records.[3] Builds strong case despite missing initial paper.
